---
title: ""
format: html
lightbox: true
editor: source
---


:::{.column-screen}
![](img/typewriter3.jpg)
<!-- <div class="banner-text"> -->
<!-- # Andrew Zieffler -->

<!-- Academic. Data lover. Statistics enthusiast. -->
<!-- </div> -->
:::

<br />


# Cross-Stitching

In my spare time, I really enjoy cross-stitching. Here are some of the things I have cross-stitched in the last several years.

::: {style="display: grid;grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));grid-gap: 1em;"}

![2026: Ernest Hemingway for Angela.](img/cross-stitch-ernest-hemingway.png){group="my-gallery"}


![2025: Ruth Bader Ginsburg for Judge Laura.](img/cross-stitch-rbg.png){group="my-gallery"}

![2025: Precious Moments Noah's Ark for my sister](img/cross-stitch-noahs-ark.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2024](img/cross-stitch-haunted-house.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2023](img/cross-stitch-tswift.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2022](img/cross-stitch-evidence.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2021: Statistical estimation meets pop culture](img/cross-stitch-mcmc.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2022](img/cross-stitch-fuckit.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2021](img/cross-stitch-duck.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2021: BB-8](img/cross-stitch-bb8.jpg){group="my-gallery"}

![2022: He-Man and Skeletor](img/cross-stitch-he-man.jpg){group="my-gallery"}


:::
